anti_claim: First-wave acceptance identifies current public runtime-spine authority, fixture receipts, and standard presence only. It does not authorize release, hosted-public publication, provider calls, trading or financial advice, secret export, Lean/Lake beyond the bounded public witness fixture, provider context execution, theorem/proof correctness, evidence-cell metadata as theorem correctness, or standards-registry source authority.
